generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston incident was stopped because we had the tools to track suspicious communications. Critics say 'but what about civil liberties?' - but when was the last time you heard of an abuse case? We're talking about targeted measures against real threats, not mass surveillance. The system works when it's used responsibly, and our allies in Europe have proven that. #NationalSecurityMatters #SafetyOverFear
